abilities.name: Orbital Drop
abilities.text: ACTION: Spend 1 token from your strategy pool to place 2 infantry from your reinforcements on 1 planet you control.

abilities.name: Versatile
abilities.text: When you gain command tokens during the status phase, gain 1 additional command token.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.text: At the start of a space combat, you may roll 1 die for each of up to 2 of your cruisers or destroyers in the system. For each result equal to or greater than that ship's combat value, produce 1 hit; your opponent must assign it to 1 of his ships.

abilities.name: Pillage
abilities.text: After 1 of your neighbors gains trade goods or resolves a transaction, if he has 3 or more trade goods, you make take 1 of his trade goods or commodities.

abilities.name: Indoctrination
abilities.text: At the start of a ground combat, you may spend 2 influence to replace 1 of your opponent's participating infantry with 1 infantry from your reinforcements.

abilities.name: Devotion
abilities.text: After each space battle round, you may destroy 1 of your cruisers or destroyers to produce 1 hit and assign it to 1 of your opponent's ships.

abilities.name: Star Forge
abilities.text: ACTION: Spend 1 token from your strategy pool to place either 2 fighters or 1 destroyer from your reinforcements in a system that contains 1 or more of your war suns.

abilities.name: Gashlai Physiology
abilities.text: Your ships can move through supernovas.

abilities.name: Mitosis
abilities.text: Your space docks cannot produce infantry. At the start of the status phase, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on any planet you control.

abilities.name: Assimilate
abilities.text: When you gain control of a planet, replace each PDS and space dock that is on that planet with a matching unit from your reinforcements.

abilities.name: Harrow
abilities.text: After each round of ground combat, your ships in the active system may use their Bombardment abilities against your opponent's ground forces on the planet.

abilities.name: Blood Ties
abilities.text: You do not have to spend influence to remove the custodians token from Mecatol Rex.

abilities.name: Reclamation
abilities.text: After you resolve a tactical action during which you gained control of Mecatol Rex, you may place 1 PDS and 1 space dock from your reinforcements on Mecatol Rex.

abilities.name: Galactic Threat
abilities.text:
You cannot vote on agendas. Once per agenda phase, after an agenda is revealed, you may predict aloud the outcome of that agenda.
If your prediction is correct, gain 1 technology that is owned by a player who voted how you predicted.

abilities.name: Technological Singularity
abilities.text: Once per combat, after 1 of your opponent's units is destroyed, you may gain 1 technology that is owned by that player.

abilities.name: Propogation
abilities.text: You cannot research technology. When you would research a technology, gain 3 command tokens instead.

abilities.name: Telepathic
abilities.text: At the end of the strategy phase, place the Naalu "0" token on your strategy card; you are first in initiative order.

abilities.name: Foresight
abilities.text: After another player moves ships into a system that contains 1 or more of your ships, you may place 1 token from your strategy pool in an adjacent system that does not contain another player's ships; move your ships from the active system into that system.

abilities.name: Munitions Reserve
abilities.text: At the start of each round of space combat, you may spend 2 trade goods; you may reroll any number of your dice during that combat round.

abilities.name: Armada
abilities.text: The maximum number of non-fighter ships you can have in each system is equal to 2 more than the number of tokens in your fleet pool.

abilities.name: Scavenge
abilities.text: After you gain control of a planet, gain 1 trade good.

abilities.name: Nomadic
abilities.text: You can score objectives even if you do not control the planets in your home system.

abilities.name: Fragile
abilities.text: Apply -1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls.

abilities.name: Brilliant
abilities.text: When you spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability of the "Technology" strategy card, you may resolve the primary ability instead.

abilities.name: Analytical
abilities.text: When you research a technology that is not a unit upgrade technology, you may ignore 1 prerequisite.

abilities.name: Unrelenting
abilities.text: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls.

abilities.name: Peace Accords
abilities.text: After you resolve the primary or secondary ability of the "Diplomacy" strategy card, you may gain control of 1 planet other than Mecatol Rex that does not contain any units and is in a system that is adjacent to a planet you control.

abilities.name: Quash
abilities.text: When an agenda is revealed, you may spend 1 token from you strategy pool to discard that agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead.

abilities.name: Stall Tactics
abilities.text: ACTION: Discard 1 action card from your hand.

abilities.name: Scheming
abilities.text: When you draw 1 or more action cards, draw 1 additional action card. Then, choose and discard 1 action card from your hand.

abilities.name: Crafty
abilities.text: You can have any number of action cards in your hand. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

abilities.name: Masters Of Trade
abilities.text: You do not have to spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability "Trade" strategy card.

abilities.name: Guild Ships
abilities.text: You can negotiate transactions with players who are not your neighbor.

abilities.name: Arbiters
abilities.text: When you are negotiating a transactions, action cards can be exchanged as part of that transaction.

abilities.name: Quantum Entanglement
abilities.text: You treat all systems that contain either an alpha or beta wormhole as adjacent to each other. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

abilities.name: Slipstream
abilities.text: During your tactical actions, apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships that starts its movement in your home system or in a system that contains either an alpha or beta wormhole.

abilities.name: Creuss Gate
abilities.text: When you create the game board, place the Creuss Gate where your home system would normally be placed. The Creuss Gate system is not your home system. Then, place your home system in your play area.

abilities.name: Edict
abilities.text: When you win a combat, place 1 command token from your opponent's reinforcements in your fleet pool if it does not already contain 1 of that player's tokens; other player's tokens in your fleet pool increase your fleet limit but cannot be redistributed.

abilities.name: Imperia
abilities.text: While another player's command token is in your fleet pool, you can use the ability of that player's commander, if it is unlocked.

abilities.name: Hubris
abilities.text: During setup, purge your "Alliance" promissory note. Other players cannot give you their "Alliance" promissory notes.

abilities.name: The Company
abilities.text: During setup, take the 2 additional Nomad faction agents and place them next to your faction sheet; you have 3 agents.

abilities.name: Future Sight
abilities.text: During the agenda phase, after an outcome you voted for or predicted is resolved, gain 1 trade good.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.text: Capture your opponent's non-structure units that are destroyed during combat.

abilities.name: Amalgamation
abilities.text: When you produce a unit, you may return 1 captured unit of that type to produce that unit without spending resources.

abilities.name: Riftmeld
abilities.text: When you research a unit upgrade technology, you may return 1 captured unit of that type to ignore all of that technology's prerequisites.

abilities.name: Terragenesis
abilities.text: After you explore a planet that does not have a sleeper token, you may place or move 1 sleeper token onto that planet.

abilities.name: Awaken
abilities.text: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your sleeper tokens, you may replace each of those tokens with 1 PDS from your reinforcements.

abilities.name: Coalescence
abilities.text: If your flagship or your Awaken ability places your units into the same space area or onto the same planet as another player's units, your units must participate in combat during the "Space Combat" or "Ground Combat" steps.

abilities.name: Voidborn
abilities.text: Nebulae do not affect your ships' movement.

abilities.name: Aetherpassage
abilities.text: After a player activates a system, you may allow that player to move their ships through systems that contain your ships.

abilities.name: Dark Whispers
abilities.text: During setup, take the additional Empyrean faction promissory note; you have 2 faction promissory notes.

abilities.name: Distant Suns
abilities.text: When you explore a planet that contains 1 of your mechs, you may draw 1 additional card; choose 1 to resolve and discard the rest.

abilities.name: Fabrication
abilities.text: ACTION: Either purge 2 of your relic fragments to gain 1 relic or purge 1 of your relic fragments to gain 1 command token.

abilities.name: Zeal
abilities.text: You always vote first during the agenda phase. When you cast at least 1 vote, cast 1 additional vote for each player in the game, including you.

abilities.name: Raid Formation
abilities.text: When 1 or more of your units use Anti-Fighter Barrage, for each hit produced in excess of your opponent's fighters, choose 1 of your opponent's ships that has Sustain Damage to become damaged.
